scores.notes: Text accuracy is high with correct company name and address, minor differences like missing 'MR DIY TESCO TERBAU' parentheses spacing. Table structure is poor as the OCR output includes a detailed itemized list not present in ground truth, and no clear table matching the ground truth structure. Numeric precision is good; total rounded matches exactly, date matches, minor rounding adjustment present but consistent. Layout is mostly preserved with correct reading order but extra sections (items list) affect clarity. Completeness is good; all ground truth fields are present, no major missing text.
